problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway may resolve What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
